boundaries: Research-only static analysis. Not investment advice. This tool does not fetch live data, connect to brokers, place orders, recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, predict returns, or produce personalized financial advice.
run_policy: Benchmarks describe deterministic artifact expectations and do not measure wall-clock performance.
Use bundled static fixtures or user-supplied static CSVs only.
Treat any missing expected artifact as a regeneration task, not as a live-data fetch request.
title: Public Evaluator Benchmark Suite
